title: Custom Base64 Encoder
description: Implement a function 'encode_plain' in 'encoder.py' that performs a simulated base64 encoding (mapping 3 bytes to 4 characters). MANDATORY CONSTRAINT: You are FORBIDDEN from importing or using the 'base64' module. Use the standard alphabet: 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/'.
